title: Badjao: The Sea Gypsies
actors: Rosa Rosal, Tony Santos, Leroy Salvador
plot: Hassan, the son of a tribe chief of the Badjaos, a pagan, sea-dwelling Filipino tribe, meets and falls for Bala-amai, the niece of the chief of the Tausugs, an Islamic, land-dwelling tribe. Although the Hassan is willing to give u...
